sampleQuestions.stem: State whether the following statement is TRUE or FALSE: The intersection of two CFLs (context-free languages) is also a CFL. A. TRUE B. FALSE
Context-free languages are: (Select all that apply) A. closed under union B. closed under complementation C. closed under intersection D. closed under Kleene closure

Which of the following definitions below generate the same language as L, where L = {x^n y^n | n >= 1}? I. E -> xEy | xy II. E -> xEy | epsilon III. E -> x^i y^i such that i >= 1 A. I only B. I and II C. II and III D. II
